purpose: Defines a report-only Mission Factory Agent framework that can audit mission ideas, draft planning briefs, and map dependencies without creating runtime missions, authorizing completion, granting rewards, using protected location data, or changing product code.
allowedOutputs: source-of-truth mapping for existing mission docs/registers
forbiddenOutputs: health, child/minor, camera, biometric, face, consent, privacy, legal, token, wallet, payment, betting, or NFT decisions
Unity, AR, native, or PR #13 implementation
client-side final authority for missions or rewards

missionPlanningRules.stopForAmbiguity: If mission ownership, authority, safety, data source, or existing source-of-truth is unclear, output review_required instead of creating or implementing a mission.
missionPlanningRules.antiDuplicateArchitecture: Use existing mission, economy, buddy, product-readiness, continuity, and TODO mappings. Do not create replacement mission engines, duplicate route systems, duplicate reward ledgers, or parallel architecture.

protectedReviewTopics: location, GPS, geofence, route, or outdoor safety
camera, face, biometric, motion, or sensor evidence
consent, privacy, legal, compliance, AGB, Datenschutz, or Impressum wording
token, NFT, wallet, payment, payout, betting, staking, marketplace, presale, or investment mechanics
reward authority, mission completion authority, anti-cheat, PvP stakes, or financial-equivalent outcomes
Unity, AR, native WellFitBuddyAR, or PR #13
readinessChecklist: mission type and user value described without runtime implementation
completion authority remains server-side or review_required
reward authority remains server-side or review_required
anti-cheat and abuse boundaries are documented
accessibility and healthy motivation are considered
human reviewer and next safe task are named
